changelog.summary: Seed entry — cross-checked from 4 authoritative sources (NLM DailyMed, WHO ATC Classification, PubChem (NIH/NLM), WSAVA TGG — Key Documents on Responsible Antimicrobial Use and AMR Prevention). ATC J01MA90 + RxNorm 37617. Thai translation + faculty review pending.
